<!-- Catalog of edge-on galaxies {\em(tables 2 and 3 of paper)} -->
<!-- +++No column could be found to attach a LINK in table: J/A+A/445/765/edge -->
<FIELD name="_Glon" ucd="pos.galactic.lon" ref="G" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_GAL_LON" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Galactic longitude (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_Glat" ucd="pos.galactic.lat" ref="G" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_GAL_LAT" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Galactic latitude (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_RAJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.ra" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Right ascension (FK5, Equinox=J2000.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_DEJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.dec" ref="J2000" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Declination (FK5, Equinox=J2000.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_RAB1950" ucd="pos.eq.ra" ref="B1950" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Right ascension (FK4, Equinox=B1950.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_DEB1950" ucd="pos.eq.dec" ref="B1950" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Declination (FK4, Equinox=B1950.0) (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_Elon2000" ucd="pos.ecliptic.lon" ref="E2000" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EC_LON" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Ecliptic longitud Equinox=J2000.0 (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="_Elat2000" ucd="pos.ecliptic.lat" ref="E2000" datatype="double" width="12" precision="8" unit="deg"><!-- ucd="POS_EC_LAT" -->

<DESCRIPTION>Ecliptic latitud Equinox=J2000.0 (computed by VizieR, not part of the original data. The format may include more digits than the original data because of internal accuracy requirements in VizieR and across other CDS services)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="gmag" ucd="phot.mag;em.opt.B" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="e_gmag" ucd="stat.error;phot.mag;em.opt.B" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="rmag" ucd="phot.mag;em.opt.R" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="e_rmag" ucd="stat.error;phot.mag;em.opt.R" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="imag" ucd="phot.mag;em.opt.I" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="e_imag" ucd="stat.error;phot.mag;em.opt.I" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="gmue" ucd="phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag.arcsec**-2"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="rmue" ucd="phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag.arcsec**-2"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="imue" ucd="phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="mag.arcsec**-2"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="z" ucd="src.redshift" datatype="float" width="7" precision="4"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="e_z" ucd="stat.error;src.redshift" datatype="float" width="10" precision="E3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="RAJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.ra;meta.main" ref="J2000" datatype="char" arraysize="12" xtype="hms"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA_MAIN" -->
<FIELD name="DEJ2000" ucd="pos.eq.dec;meta.main" ref="J2000" datatype="char" arraysize="12" xtype="dms"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC_MAIN" -->
<FIELD name="el(g)" ucd="phys.luminosity" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_GENERAL" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Luminosity weighted mean isophotal ellipticity in g band (G1)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="el(r)" ucd="phys.luminosity" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="PHYS_LUMINOSITY_GENERAL" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Luminosity weighted mean isophotal ellipticity in r band (G1)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="el(i)" ucd="src.ellipticity;stat.mean" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<DESCRIPTION>Luminosity weighted mean isophotal ellipticity in i band (G1)</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="CI(g)" ucd="meta.code;spect.index" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="CI(r)" ucd="meta.code;spect.index" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="CI(i)" ucd="meta.code;spect.index" datatype="float" width="6" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="Diam(g)" ucd="phys.angSize" datatype="double" width="8" precision="3" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="Diam(r)" ucd="phys.angSize" datatype="double" width="8" precision="3" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="Diam(i)" ucd="phys.angSize" datatype="double" width="8" precision="3" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="a/b(g)" ucd="phys.angSize;arith.ratio" datatype="double" width="8" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="a/b(r)" ucd="phys.angSize;arith.ratio" datatype="double" width="8" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
<FIELD name="a/b(i)" ucd="phys.angSize;arith.ratio" datatype="double" width="8" precision="3"><!-- ucd="?" -->
